zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Lester於1615年4月24日出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親Francis Lister23歲，母親Jane Bywell22歲。他於1642年與Barbara Bradley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可格盧斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1639年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼格盧斯特。他去世於1669年6月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Lester于1615年4月24日出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲Francis Lister23岁，母亲Jane Bywell22岁。他于1642年与Barbara Bradley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可格盧斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1639年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼格盧斯特。他去世于1669年6月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Luster
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Lester  . This surname is common among African Americans.
German: habitational name for someone from any of the places called Lust (see   Lust   2).
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): either an artificial extension of Lust 1 or from southern German Luster ‘chandelier’.

variants.name: Lassiter
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Leicester (see   Lester  ). This name has been long established in North America, and occurs in a wide variety of forms.

variants.name: Lister
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Laster
meanings: occupational name for a maker of cobblers’ lasts, from Middle English last, lest, the wooden form in the shape of a foot used for making or repairing shoes (Old English lǣste from lāst ‘footprint’).

variants.name: Leister
meanings: German: occupational name for a maker of lasts or a cobbler, from Middle High German leist + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Lester was born on 24 April 1615, in London, England, his father, Francis Lister, was 23 and his mother, Jane Bywell, was 22. He married Barbara Bradley in 1642, in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He immigrated to Gloucester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1639. He died on 7 June 1669, in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 54.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Lesterが1615年4月24日にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Francis Listerは23歳，母Jane Bywellは22歳であった。1642年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスグロウセスターでBarbara Bradleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーグロウセスターに移住した。彼は1669年6月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Lester(이)가 1615년 4월 24일 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Lister(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Bywell(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1642년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 그루스스터에서 Barbara Bradley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1639년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 그루스스터로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1669년 6월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Lester nasceu em 24 de abril de 1615, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Francis Lister, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jane Bywell, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Bradley em 1642, em Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Gloucester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1639. Ele faleceu em 7 de junho de 1669, em New London, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Lester родился 24 апреля 1615 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени Francis Lister было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Bywell, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Bradley в 1642 г. в местности глоусестир, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он иммигрировал в глоусестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1639 году. Он умер 7 июня 1669 г. в местности ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Lester nació el 24 de abril de 1615, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Francis Lister, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Jane Bywell, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Barbara Bradley en 1642, en Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Inmigró a Gloucester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1639. Murió el 7 de junio de 1669, en New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 54 años.
